sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, text_col STRING, date_col DATE);
INSERT INTO fuzz_test (id, text_col, date_col) VALUES (1, '🤦🏼‍♂️', DATE '2023-01-01');
INSERT INTO fuzz_test (id, text_col, date_col) VALUES (2, '🤦🏽‍♀️', DATE '2023-01-02');
INSERT INTO fuzz_test (id, text_col, date_col) VALUES (3, '👨‍💻', NULL);
SELECT id, left_grapheme(text_col, 1) AS first_grapheme, date_col + (id * 2) AS new_date FROM fuzz_test WHERE date_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count, left_grapheme(text_col, 1) AS first_grapheme FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY left_grapheme(text_col, 1) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, left_grapheme(text_col, 1 || '1') AS first_grapheme FROM fuzz_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM fuzz_test WHERE date_col IS NULL);

WITH extended_dates AS (SELECT id, date_col + 5 AS extended_date FROM fuzz_test WHERE date_col IS NOT NULL) SELECT id, left_grapheme(text_col, 1) AS first_grapheme, extended_date FROM extended_dates JOIN fuzz_test ON extended_dates.id = fuzz_test.id;
SELECT id, left_grapheme(text_col, 1) AS first_grapheme FROM fuzz_test WHERE LEFT(text_col, 1) IS NOT NULL AND date_col + 7 > DATE '2023-01-05';
CREATE TABLE temp_fuzz AS SELECT id, left_grapheme(text_col, COUNT(*)) AS complex_grapheme FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) < 3;
